Bash(cd /c/Work/ClaudeCode/vat-system && \\
  git add .gitignore .gitattributes \\
    .devcontainer/devcontainer.json \\
    .devcontainer/docker-compose.yml \\
    CLAUDE.md \\
    api/Dockerfile \\
    "api/src/main/resources/logback-spring.xml" \\
    docker-compose.yml \\
    .github/workflows/ci.yml \\
    infrastructure/ \\
    agents/devops-agent/ && \\
  git add -u && \\
  echo "Staged")

Bash(cd /c/Work/ClaudeCode/vat-system && git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
DevOps Agent: CI/CD pipeline, Kubernetes manifests, Docker images, dev container fixes

- Fix .gitignore: add **/build/ glob and !gradle-wrapper.properties; purge
  all tracked .gradle/ and build/ files from git index
- devcontainer.json: add postStartCommand \(chmod +x gradlew\) and
  terminal.integrated.defaultProfile.linux = bash
- api/Dockerfile: multi-stage build \(temurin:21-jdk-jammy builder →
  temurin:21-jre-alpine runtime\); non-root vatuser; HEALTHCHECK; container
  JVM flags \(-XX:+UseContainerSupport, -XX:MaxRAMPercentage=75.0\)
- docker-compose.yml \(root\): api + postgres:16-alpine + adminer for local dev
- .github/workflows/ci.yml: test job \(Gradle build + postgres service
  container + JUnit reporter\) + build-image job \(Docker Buildx, main only\)
- infrastructure/k8s/cluster/: namespace + secrets-template \(no real values\)
- infrastructure/k8s/api/: Deployment \(2 replicas, resource limits, probes\),
  Service \(ClusterIP\), ConfigMap, HPA \(2-10 replicas, 70% CPU\)
- infrastructure/k8s/postgres/: StatefulSet + headless Service
  All 8 manifests pass kubectl apply --dry-run=client
- api/src/main/resources/logback-spring.xml: structured JSON logging via
  LogstashEncoder \(non-local profiles\); human-readable console for local
- infrastructure/README.md: dev container, local compose, k8s deployment
  steps, CI overview, add-new-service guide

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
